enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief vlog on December 21st (his mom's birthday and the winter solstice), noting it's also 4:20. He talks about his recent work on a Google Earth road-mapping project, plans to reorganize his room and mount a TV, collecting bike videos from YouTube, and listening to a History of England podcast. He shares an idea to create a historical map of Boulder County overlaid with medieval English social hierarchy (serfs, earls, lords, etc.).
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feeling like you can finish something is the right moment to switch to other projects
excited to create a medieval land hierarchy map of Boulder County and likely to start it soon
